2 Up to two courses with at least one course at the intermediate level and no more than one course at the introductory level. (High school equivalency does not satisfy this requirement.)

3 Up to two courses:

• Any mathematics (MATH) course numbered 107 or higher.

• An approved programming course worth at least three credits, please refer to this page for a current list (https://merrill.umd.edu/ degrees-programs/bachelors-degree/).

4 Numbered 300 or higher, cannot be in Communication.
